prompt_inputs.goal: Pre-match energy and recovery for competitive soccer
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, allergic to peanuts and tree nuts

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 3 meals and 1-2 snacks distributed throughout the day
All meals are vegetarian with no peanuts or tree nuts
Includes adequate carbohydrates, protein, and micronutrients for soccer performance
Each meal/snack is practical and quick to prepare
task_description: Write a compact, consie 1 day meal okan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint scenario (vegetarian soccer player or athlete with food allergies) requiring nutrient-dense alternatives while maintaining performance nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
Macronutrient ratio emphasizes carbohydrates (55-65% of calories) for endurance fuel
Total daily calories appropriate for marathon runner training (approximately 2,800-3,200 kcal)
Includes specific foods/portions that are practical and compact to prepare/consume
task_description: Write a compact, consie 1 day meal okan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading with specific macronutrient ratios

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gains for powerlifting competition in 8 weeks

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and pre/post-workout meals
Includes minimum 2.2g protein per kg body weight (187g daily) distributed across meals
Pre-workout meal includes carbs and moderate protein; post-workout meal prioritizes fast-digesting protein and carbs
All meals align with vegetarian restrictions while supporting strength athlete nutritional needs
task_description: Write a compact, consie 1 day meal okan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals with strategic pre/post-workout nutrition timing
